recommendations.title: London Has Fallen
recommendations.overview: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning discovers a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

recommendations.title: Angel
recommendations.overview: Molly Stewart, a teen at the top of her class who survives by working nights as a prostitute on Hollywood Blvd, finds her world beginning to fall apart when a depraved, necrophiliac serial killer begins targeting LA’s streetwalkers.

recommendations.title: Furious 7
recommendations.overview: Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family for his comatose brother.

recommendations.title: Lust, Caution
recommendations.overview: During World War II, a secret agent must seduce and assassinate an official who works for the Japanese puppet government in Shanghai.

recommendations.title: Lady Snowblood 2: Love Song of Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Lady Snowblood is caught by the police and sentenced to death for her crimes. As she is sent to the gallows she is rescued by the secret police who offer her a deal to assassinate some revolutionaries.

recommendations.title: The Desert Fox: The Story of Rommel
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Erwin Rommel and his involvement in the plot to assassinate Hitler.
